parameters.description: Send notifications to your own MessageBird SMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise msgbird:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a MessageBird Messages API JSON body and post it to rest.messagebird.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_TO }"],"originator":"${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_FROM }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment MessageBird SMS destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to MessageBird Messages API (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MessageBird SMS apikey

source_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MessageBird SMS source
